---
title: "Projects"
---

::: {.project-card}
### [MapReader](https://github.com/maps-as-data/MapReader)
*2023–present*

A computer vision pipeline for analysing historical maps at scale. Winner of the Roy Rosenzweig Prize (2023).
:::

::: {.project-card}
### [reginald](https://github.com/alan-turing-institute/reginald)
*2024*

An LLM-powered Slack assistant for the Alan Turing Institute, built to answer questions about institute processes and research.
:::

::: {.project-card}
### [t0-1](https://github.com/rwood-97/t0-1)
*2025–2026*

Research into training and fine-tuning large language models for scientific tasks.
:::

::: {.project-card}
### [Eden](https://github.com/alan-turing-institute/eden)
*2026–present*

Environmental data and nature recovery tooling developed at the Turing.
:::

::: {.project-card}
### [multi_node_inference](https://github.com/rwood-97/multi_node_inference)
*2025*

Tools and recipes for running LLM inference across multiple HPC nodes using vLLM and Slurm.
:::
